mapper.select: select database_type as dataBaseType ,project_name as projectName, tablename_en as tableNameEN, tablename_ch as tableNameCH,PARTITIONED as partitioned,DATA_SOURCE_ID as dataSourceId from DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE where ISDELETE = '0' and ISADDMONITOR = '已控'

select t1.database_type as dataBaseType , t1.tablename_en as tableNameEN,t1.tablename_ch as tableNameCH ,'0' as tableTodaySum , case when t2.tableallcount is null then 0 else t2.tableallcount end as tableAllSum , to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') as statisticDay , t1.project_name as tableProject , sys_guid()||trunc(dbms_random.value(0,100000000)) as statisticId from DATA_STORAGE_ADD_TABLE t1 left join (select tableproject ,tablename, tableallcount from (select row_number() over(partition by tableproject||tablename order by INSERTEDDATATIME desc) rn , tableproject ,tablename , ispartition ,INSERTEDDATATIME , tableallcount from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL) where rn =1 )t2 on t1.project_name||t1.tablename_en = t2.tableproject||t2.tablename

SELECT t4.* , CASE WHEN t5.frequency IS NULL THEN '0/0' ELSE t5.frequency END AS frequency, CASE WHEN t5.TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH = '0' THEN 'NONLIVING' WHEN t5.TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH IS NULL THEN 'NONLIVING' ELSE 'LIVING' END AS liveType, t5.TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH as tableUseCountOfmonth FROM ( SELECT t1.* , CASE WHEN t2.partitioncount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t2.partitioncount END AS yesterdayCount, -- 昨日分区数据量 CASE WHEN t3.averageSum IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t3.averageSum END AS averageDailyVolume, -- 近几天分区的平均数据量（告警设置） CASE WHEN t3.averageSize IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t3.averageSize END AS averageDailySize -- 近几天分区的平均数据大小（告警设置） FROM ( SELECT sjxjbm, --表协议名 CASE WHEN c.name IS NULL THEN tableAll.TABLECOMMENT ELSE c.name END AS name, --表中文名 CASE WHEN c.tablename IS NULL THEN upper( tableAll.tablename ) ELSE upper( c.tablename ) END AS tableNameEn, --表英文名 c.PRIMARYDATASOURCECH AS primaryDatasourceCh, -- 一级数据来源中文名 c.SECONDARYDATASOURCECH AS secondaryDatasourceCh, -- 二级数据来源中文名 c.PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH AS primaryOrganizationCh, -- 数据组织一级分类中文名 c.SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH AS secondaryOrganizationCh, -- 数据组织二级分类中文名 -- c.THREEORGANIZATIONCH as threeOrganizationCh, -- 数据组织三级分类 @add 20200218 -- c.FACTORONENAME as factorOneName , -- 数据资源要素一级分类中文名 -- c.FACTORTWONAME as factorTwoName, -- 数据资源要素二级分类中文名 -- c.FACTORDETAILEDNAME as factorDetailedName , -- 数据资源要素细目分类代码名称 -- c.FACTORATTRIBUTESNAME as factorAttributesName, -- 数据资源属性分类代码名称 tableAll.TABLECREATEDTIME AS tableCreatedTime, -- 表创建时间 CASE WHEN tableAll.TABLEALLCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE tableAll.TABLEALLCOUNT END AS tableAllCount, -- 表数据总行数 到昨天分区 CASE WHEN tableAll.tablesize IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE tableAll.tablesize END AS tableSize, -- 表数据总大小 到昨天分区 byte tableAll.TABLEPROJECT AS tableProject, -- 表的项目名 CASE WHEN tableAll.ISPARTITION != 0 THEN '' WHEN tableAll.LIFECYCLE = - 1 THEN '永久' ELSE to_char( tableAll.LIFECYCLE ) END AS lifeCycle, -- 表的生命周期 CASE WHEN tableAll.ISPARTITION IS NULL THEN '-1' ELSE to_char( tableAll.ISPARTITION ) END AS partitionMessage, -- 分区标识 CASE WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE' WHEN tableAll.TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, -- 表类型 odps/ads/HBASE/HIVE CASE WHEN sjxjbm IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '-1' END AS registerState -- 注册状态 -- ,LABELS FROM ( SELECT * FROM classify_interface_all_Date WHERE tablename IS NOT NULL ) c full join ( SELECT TABLEPROJECT, tablename, TABLECOMMENT, TABLEALLCOUNT, TABLETYPE, tablesize, LIFECYCLE, ISPARTITION, TABLECREATEDTIME, CASE WHEN length( PARTITIONDATE ) = 6 THEN to_char( to_date( t.INSERTEDDATATIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss' ) - 1, 'yyyyMMdd' ) ELSE PARTITIONDATE END AS PARTITIONDATE FROM ( SELECT TABLEPROJECT, tablename, TABLECOMMENT, TABLEALLCOUNT, TABLETYPE, tablesize, LIFECYCLE, ISPARTITION, INSERTEDDATATIME, PARTITIONDATE, TABLECREATEDTIME, ROW_NUMBER () over ( partition BY concat( TABLEPROJECT, tablename ) ORDER BY PARTITIONDATE DESC ) AS num FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE substr( PARTITIONDATE, 0, 1 ) = '2' AND ( length( PARTITIONDATE ) = 6 OR length( PARTITIONDATE ) = 8 ) ) t WHERE t.num = 1 AND TO_TIMESTAMP(t.INSERTEDDATATIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') > (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '8 days') ) tableAll ON upper( c.tablename ) = upper( tableAll.tablename ) ) t1 left join ( SELECT partitioncount, tablename, tableproject FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE partitiondate = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYYMMDD') ) t2 ON upper( t1.tableNameEn ) = upper( t2.tablename ) AND upper( t1.tableProject ) = upper( t2.tableproject ) left join ( SELECT tableNewName, ceil( sum( partitioncount ) / count( tableNewName )) AS averageSum, ceil( sum( partitionsize ) / count( tableNewName )) AS averageSize FROM ( SELECT tableproject || tablename AS tableNewName, partitioncount, partitionsize, PARTITIONDATE, ROW_NUMBER () over ( partition BY concat( TABLEPROJECT, tablename ) ORDER BY PARTITIONDATE DESC ) AS num FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL ) t5 WHERE t5.num <
#{setting.fluctuateDays,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
8
8
GROUP BY tableNewName ) t3 ON upper( t3.tableNewName ) = upper( t1.tableProject || t1.tableNameEn ) ) t4 left join ( SELECT DISTINCT TABLENAMEEN, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH || '/' || TABLEUSECOUNT AS frequency, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH FROM storecycleanduseheat ) t5 ON upper( t5.TABLENAMEEN ) = upper( t4.tableproject || '.' || t4.tableNameEn ) AND upper( t5.TABLETYPE ) = upper( t4.tableType ) WHERE tableproject IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete: delete from table_organization_assets where STATISTICS_TIME > DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE)
delete from USER_AUTHORITY where create_time > DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) and modulecode = 'ZCGL'
mapper.select: select upper(SJXJBM) as sjxjbm,upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) as tableNameEn,APPROVAL_STATUS as registerState from DATA_REGISTER where APPROVAL_STATUS ='2' and APPROVAL_TYPE = 'register'
select distinct OBJECTID as objectId,upper(TABLEID) as SJXJBM,upper(TABLENAME) as tableNameEn,OBJECTSTATE as objectState from SYNLTE.OBJECT where RELATE_TABLENAME = 'OBJECTFIELD'

select a.SJXJBM as sjxjbm, upper(a.TABLE_NAME_EN) as tableNameEn, upper(a.TABLE_PROJECT) as tableProject, a.TABLE_TYPE as tableType, a.STATISTICS_TIME as statisticsTime, a.OBJECT_ID as objectId, a.name, a.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryDatasourceCh, a.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as secondaryDatasourceCh, a.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryOrganizationCh, a.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as secondaryOrganizationCh, a.PARTITION_MESSAGE as partitionMessage, a.TABLE_ALL_COUNT as tableAllCount, a.TABLE_SIZE as tableSize, a.LIFE_CYCLE as lifeCycle, a.YESTERDAY_COUNT as yesterdayCount, a.AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME as averageDailyVolume, a.VALUE_RATE as valueRate, a.NULL_RATE as nullRate, a.FREQUENCY as frequency, a.AVERAGE_DAILY_SIZE as averageDailySize, -- LABELS as labels, a.REGISTER_STATE as registerState, a.object_state as objectState, b.SJZZFLCODEID as organizationIdLastLevel, b.SJLYFLCODEID as dataresourceIdLastLevel from TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS_TEMP a left join (SELECT DISTINCT SJXJBM,TABLENAME, case when SJYJFLCODENAME is null or SJYJFLCODENAME = '' then 'null' else 'JZCODEGASJZZFL' || SJYJFLCODENAME || SJEJFLCODENAME || SJSJFLCODENAME end as SJZZFLCODEID, case when SJLYYJCODENAME is null or SJLYYJCODENAME = '' then 'null' else 'GACODE000404' || SJLYYJCODENAME || SJLYEJCODENAME end as SJLYFLCODEID FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE) b on upper(a.table_name_en) = b.TABLENAME
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a USING (SELECT '4' AS TABLETYPE, #{hbaseParam.TABLEPROJECT} AS TABLEPROJECT, #{hbaseParam.TABLENAME, jdbcType = VARCHAR} as TABLENAME, to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PARTITIONDATE ) b ON (a.PARTITIONDATE = b.PARTITIONDATE AND a.TABLENAME = b.TABLENAME AND a.TABLETYPE = b.TABLETYPE AND a.TABLEPROJECT = b.TABLEPROJECT) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TABLECOMMENT = #{hbaseParam.TABLECOMMENT, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, LIFECYCLE = #{hbaseParam.LIFECYCL, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, ISPARTITION = #{hbaseParam.ISPARTITION, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, PARTITIONCOUNT = #{hbaseParam.PARTITIONCOUNT, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, PARTITIONSIZE = #{hbaseParam.PARTITIONSIZE, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, TABLEALLCOUNT = #{hbaseParam.TABLEALLCOUNT, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, TABLESIZE = #{hbaseParam.TABLESIZE, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, INSERTEDDATATIME = to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TABLECOMMENT, TABLEPROJECT, TABLENAME, LIFECYCLE, ISPARTITION, PARTITIONDATE, PARTITIONCOUNT, PARTITIONSIZE, TABLEALLCOUNT, TABLESIZE, INSERTEDDATATIME, TABLETYPE) VALUES (#{hbaseParam.TABLECOMMENT, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{hbaseParam.TABLEPROJECT, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{hbaseParam.TABLENAME, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{hbaseParam.LIFECYCL, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{hbaseParam.ISPARTITION, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{hbaseParam.PARTITIONCOUNT, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{hbaseParam.PARTITIONSIZE, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{hbaseParam.TABLEALLCOUNT, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{hbaseParam.TABLESIZE, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '4')

merge into SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a USING (select to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as PARTITIONDATE,#{hiveParam.TABLENAME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}as TABLENAME, 5 as TABLETYPE,#{hiveParam.TABLEPROJECT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as TABLEPROJECT) b on ( a.PARTITIONDATE = b.PARTITIONDATE and a.TABLENAME = b.TABLENAME and a.TABLETYPE = b.TABLETYPE and a.TABLEPROJECT = b.TABLEPROJECT) when matched then update set TABLECOMMENT = #{hiveParam.TABLECOMMENT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LIFECYCLE = #{hiveParam.LIFECYCLE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLESIZE = #{hiveParam.TABLESIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME = #{hiveParam.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARTITIONCOUNT = #{hiveParam.PARTITIONCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISPARTITION = #{hiveParam.ISPARTITION,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME = #{hiveParam.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLECREATEDTIME = #{hiveParam.TABLECREATEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSERTEDDATATIME = to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TABLEALLCOUNT = #{hiveParam.TABLEALLCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARTITIONSIZE = #{hiveParam.PARTITIONSIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (TABLENAME,TABLEPROJECT,TABLECOMMENT,TABLETYPE,LIFECYCLE,TABLESIZE, TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,PARTITIONDATE,PARTITIONCOUNT,ISPARTITION, TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,TABLECREATEDTIME,INSERTEDDATATIME,TABLEALLCOUNT, PARTITIONSIZE ) values (#{hiveParam.TABLENAME,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{hiveParam.TABLEPROJECT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hiveParam.TABLECOMMENT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},5, #{hiveParam.LIFECYCLE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hiveParam.TABLESIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hiveParam.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{hiveParam.PARTITIONCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{hiveParam.ISPARTITION,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hiveParam.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hiveParam.TABLECREATEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR},to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{hiveParam.TABLEALLCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{hiveParam.PARTITIONSIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

merge into SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a USING (select to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as INSERTEDDATATIME, #{clickhouseParam.TABLENAME,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as TABLENAME, 7 as TABLETYPE, #{clickhouseParam.TABLEPROJECT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as TABLEPROJECT ) b on ( to_char(to_date(a.INSERTEDDATATIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'), 'yyyyMMdd') = b.INSERTEDDATATIME and lower(a.TABLENAME) = lower(b.TABLENAME) and a.TABLETYPE = b.TABLETYPE and lower(a.TABLEPROJECT) = lower(b.TABLEPROJECT)) when matched then update set TABLECOMMENT = #{clickhouseParam.TABLECOMMENT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LIFECYCLE = #{clickhouseParam.LIFECYCL,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLESIZE = #{clickhouseParam.TABLESIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME = #{clickhouseParam.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARTITIONCOUNT = #{clickhouseParam.PARTITIONCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISPARTITION = #{clickhouseParam.ISPARTITION,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME = #{clickhouseParam.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLECREATEDTIME = #{clickhouseParam.TABLECREATEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARTITIONDATE = #{clickhouseParam.PARTITIONDATE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLEALLCOUNT = #{clickhouseParam.TABLEALLCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARTITIONSIZE = #{clickhouseParam.PARTITIONSIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (TABLENAME,TABLEPROJECT,TABLECOMMENT,TABLETYPE,LIFECYCLE,TABLESIZE, TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,PARTITIONDATE,PARTITIONCOUNT,ISPARTITION, TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,TABLECREATEDTIME,INSERTEDDATATIME,TABLEALLCOUNT, PARTITIONSIZE ) values ( lower(#{clickhouseParam.TABLENAME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), lower(#{clickhouseParam.TABLEPROJECT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{clickhouseParam.TABLECOMMENT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},7, #{clickhouseParam.LIFECYCL,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clickhouseParam.TABLESIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clickhouseParam.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clickhouseParam.PARTITIONDATE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clickhouseParam.PARTITIONCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{clickhouseParam.ISPARTITION,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clickhouseParam.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clickhouseParam.TABLECREATEDTIME,jdbcType=VARCHAR},to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{clickhouseParam.TABLEALLCOUNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{clickhouseParam.PARTITIONSIZE,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.delete: delete from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL where TABLETYPE = #{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(INSERTEDDATATIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYYMMDD') = to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.select: select THRESHOLD_VALUE from DGN_COMMON_SETTING where upper(PARENT_ID) = upper('dataProperty') and IS_ACTIVE = '1' and TREE_TYPE = '3'

select SJXJBM as tableId,TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn,OBJECT_ID as objectId,APPROVAL_ID as approvalId, APPROVAL_STATUS as approvalStatus,APPROVAL_CREATE_TIME as approvalCreateTime, APPROVAL_UPDATE_TIME as approvalUpdateTime,APPROVAL_TYPE as approvalType, TABLE_PROJECT as tableProject from DATA_REGISTER where APPROVAL_STATUS ='2' and APPROVAL_TYPE = #{approvalType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT upper(TABLENAME) AS tableName, upper(TABLEPROJECT) AS projectName, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'Hive-HUAWEI' WHEN TABLETYPE = 12 THEN 'Hive-CDH' WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, TABLESIZE AS totalSize, PARTITIONCOUNT AS partionCount, TABLEALLCOUNT AS totalCount, PARTITIONSIZE AS partionSize, ISPARTITION AS isPartitionTable, LIFECYCLE AS tableLife, TABLECREATEDTIME as tableCreatedTime, tableLastMetaModifiedTime as lastDataModifiedTime, partitionnum as partitionNum FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(INSERTEDDATATIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYYMMDD') = to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') and TABLETYPE != 7

SELECT upper(TABLENAME) AS tableName, upper(TABLEPROJECT) AS projectName, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, TABLESIZE AS totalSize, PARTITIONCOUNT AS partionCount, TABLEALLCOUNT AS totalCount, PARTITIONSIZE AS partionSize, ISPARTITION AS isPartitionTable, LIFECYCLE AS tableLife, TABLECREATEDTIME as tableCreatedTime, tableLastMetaModifiedTime as lastDataModifiedTime, partitionnum as partitionNum, partitiondate as partionDate, TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(INSERTEDDATATIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYYMMDD') as insertDataTime FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL WHERE TABLETYPE = 7 and TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(INSERTEDDATATIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYYMMDD') >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')

/*刘新鹏修改的CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE表，FIRSTORGANIZATIONCH为二级组织分类，SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH为三级组织分类*/ SELECT DISTINCT SJXJBM as sjxjbm, upper(TABLENAME) as tableNameEn, NAME as name, PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as primaryOrganizationCh, FIRSTORGANIZATIONCH as threeLevelOrganizationCh, SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH as secondaryOrganizationCh, PRIMARYDATASOURCECH as primaryDatasourceCh, SECONDARYDATASOURCECH as secondaryDatasourceCh, OBJECTID as objectId, OBJECTSTATE as objectState, case when SJYJFLCODENAME is null or SJYJFLCODENAME = '' then 'null' else 'JZCODEGASJZZFL'||SJYJFLCODENAME||SJEJFLCODENAME||SJSJFLCODENAME end as organizationIdLastLevel, case when SJLYYJCODENAME is null or SJLYYJCODENAME = '' then 'null' else 'GACODE000404'||SJLYYJCODENAME||SJLYEJCODENAME end as dataresourceIdLastLevel FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE

SELECT t3.*, CASE WHEN t3.averageSum IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t3.averageSum END AS averageDailyVolume, -- 近几天分区的平均数据量（告警设置） CASE WHEN t3.averageSize IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE t3.averageSize END AS averageDailySize -- 近几天分区的平均数据大小（告警设置） FROM (SELECT tableproject as projectName, tablename as tableName, tableType, ceil(sum(partitioncount) / count(tableproject || tablename || tableType)) AS averageSum, ceil(sum(partitionsize) / count(tableproject || tablename || tableType)) AS averageSize FROM (SELECT tableproject, tablename, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE-HUAWEI' WHEN TABLETYPE = 12 THEN 'HIVE-CDH' WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, partitioncount, partitionsize, partitiondate, row_number() over(PARTITION BY concat(TABLEPROJECT, tableproject || tablename || tableType) ORDER BY PARTITIONDATE DESC) AS num FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL) t5 WHERE t5.num < 8 GROUP BY tablename, tableproject, tableType) t3

SELECT substr( TABLENAMEEN, 1, instr( TABLENAMEEN, '.' ) - 1 ) AS projectName, substr( TABLENAMEEN, instr( TABLENAMEEN, '.' ) + 1 ) AS tableName, tableType, CASE WHEN frequency IS NULL THEN '0/0' ELSE frequency END AS frequency, CASE WHEN TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH = '0' THEN 'NONLIVING' WHEN TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH IS NULL THEN 'NONLIVING' ELSE 'LIVING' END AS liveType, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH as tableUseCountOfmonth FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TABLENAMEEN, CASE WHEN TABLETYPE = 1 THEN 'ODPS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 2 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 3 THEN 'ADS' WHEN TABLETYPE = 4 THEN 'HBASE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 5 THEN 'HIVE' WHEN TABLETYPE = 7 THEN 'CLICKHOUSE' ELSE '' END AS tableType, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH || '/' || TABLEUSECOUNT AS frequency, TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH FROM storecycleanduseheat )
mapper.delete: delete from TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '#{item} days') > STATISTICS_TIME
mapper.select: select INSIDE_ACCEPT from DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS where data_time > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '#{i} days') and table_name_en = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select resource_id as sjxjbm, storage_acceptor as tableAllCount, to_char(data_time,'yyyyMMdd') as updateDate from dac_bill_link_statistic where data_time > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '#{i} days')
select INSIDE_ACCEPT from DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS where data_time > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '#{i} days') and table_name_en = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select tabletype || '.' || sjxjbm as sjxjbm, tableAllCount, updateDate from (select distinct case when tabletype = '1' then 'odps' when tabletype = '2' or tabletype = '3' then 'ads' when tabletype = '4' then 'hbase' when tabletype = '5' or tabletype = '12' then 'hive' when tabletype = '7' then 'clickhouse' else '123' end as tabletype, lower(tableproject) || '.' || lower(tablename) as sjxjbm, tableallcount as tableAllCount, partitiondate as updateDate from synlte.syndmg_table_all where TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(INSERTEDDATATIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '${i} day', 'YYYYMMDD') and TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(INSERTEDDATATIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYYMMDD') <= to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') and tableallcount is not null) x

select codeid as codeId,codename as codeName,codetext as codeText, parcodeid as codeIdPar from v_classify_info t
where upper(t.codeid) like upper('%${classCode}%')

select distinct TABLENAME as tableName, SJXJBM as tableId, PROJECT_NAME as projectName, case when sjzzyjfl is null then 'null' else sjzzyjfl end as sjzzyjfl, case when sjzzejfl is null then 'null' else sjzzejfl end as sjzzejfl from synlte.public_data_info
select TABLENAME from synlte.object
select tablename as tableNameEn, project_name as tableProject, store_type as tableType from synlte.object_store_info
